REMARK: HEARING HELD. EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING IDENTIY FRAUD USED TO CREATE FICTITIOUS BUSINESS ENTITY DENIED. REGULAR NOTICE MOTION REQUIRED.
MOTION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING IDENTITY FRAUD USED TO CREATE FICTITIOUS BUSINESS ENTITY, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER SPILLANE, KAITLYN HEARING SET FOR APR-06-2023 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING IDENTITY FRAUD.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-06-2023 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER KAITLYN SPILLANE'S MOTION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING IDENTITY FRAUD USED TO CREATE FICTITIOUS BUSINESS ENTITY. SPILLANE'S MOTION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING IDENTITY FRAUD IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE SHOWN, IT IS ORDERED THAT PETITIONER KAITLYN SPILLANE'S NAME AND PERSONAL IDENTIFYING INFORMATION FOR THE BUSINESS ENTITY FILING FOR SPILLANE TRUCKING LLC BE REMOVED FROM PUBLICLY ACCESSIBLE ELECTRONIC INDEXES AND DATABASES. PETITIONER HAS NO CONNECTION TO SPILLANE TRUCKING LLC. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Motion For Order Confirming Identity Fraud Used To Create Fictitious Business Entity
Off Calendar Apr-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Kaitlyn Spillane, 650-678-5229 Petitioner in Pro Per.
No other appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER KAITLYN SPILLANE'S Motion For Order Confirming Identity Fraud Used To Create Fictitious Business Entity.

Spillane's motion for order confirming identity fraud is granted. Good cause shown, it is ordered that petitioner Kaitlyn Spillane's name and personal identifying information for the business entity filing for Spillane Trucking LLC be removed from publicly accessible electronic indexes and databases. Petitioner has no connection to Spillane Trucking LLC.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
